◎简　　介  

　　A wealthy family with a storied past and a large sprawling estate, hires Henry to oversee the menu for an annual summer gala. But when one of the entertainers at the event dies, Henry finds himself caught in the cross hairs of a bitter family feud.
this_title: Eat, Drink & Be Buried: A Gourmet Detective Mystery
